name: Moxxie
notes: Moxxie Ventures, early-stage VC firm. Domain already confirmed. SF headquarters corroborated by multiple sources.

name: Rackhouse Venture Capital
notes: Some sources list SF, but Crunchbase and PitchBook consistently cite Menlo Park, CA. Domain already confirmed.

name: Wonder Ventures
notes: LA-focused VC. Some sources say Santa Monica, others say Malibu or LA broadly. Santa Monica is the most cited specific city.

name: Script Capital
notes: Early-stage pre-seed VC fund. Domain already confirmed. SF HQ corroborated by multiple sources.

name: NextView Ventures
notes: Seed-stage VC with offices in Boston (HQ), NYC, and SF. Boston is the primary headquarters. Founded 2010.

name: Root Ventures
notes: Hardware/deep tech VC firm. Domain already confirmed. SF HQ confirmed by multiple sources including ZoomInfo address.

name: LEO Capital
notes: India-focused early-stage VC fund, headquartered in Singapore (also has presence in Delhi/India and Helsinki/Finland). Not a US company.

name: Collaborative Fund
notes: Founded 2010 by Craig Shapiro. NYC HQ consistently cited across all sources. ~$1B AUM. Portfolio includes Kickstarter, Lyft.

name: K9 Ventures
notes: Pre-seed tech VC founded by Manu Kumar. Palo Alto HQ consistently cited. Official site k9ventures.com confirmed.

name: Unshackled Ventures
notes: VC focused on immigrant founders. Palo Alto cited as HQ with a secondary SF presence. Some sources list SF as primary.

name: Angular Ventures
notes: Deep tech enterprise VC founded 2018 by Gil Dibner. Primary HQ in London, UK (Great Marlborough St). Also has presence in Tel Aviv and New York. Not US-headquartered.

name: Montage Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC focused on fintech, commerce, and healthcare. Founded 2013. Menlo Park, CA HQ confirmed by multiple sources.
